channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: California fire crews save Little League game from power outage
item.description: The Lakeside fire department, responding to check on smoking power lines causing the outage, helped save the game with lighting from a nearby source.

item.title: The Man with Two Names
item.description: After a conviction in the arson death of a billionaire in Monaco, Ted Maher changes his name and orders a hit on his estranged wife in New Mexico.

item.title: 3 dead as vehicle strikes pedestrians in Oakland, officials say
item.description: The driver and several others were injured, the Oakland Fire Department said.

item.title: At least 4 killed in Russia by Ukrainian drone strikes on Russia
item.description: Russian defenses shot down 81 drones headed for Moscow overnight, state agency Tass reported, citing Sobyanin.
